description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages try, build, deploy, test, and release. In the try stage add four jobs (try_arthur, try_dean, try_herb, try_kema) each using the ubuntu:16.04 Docker image and echoing a greeting ("Hello World" or "Hello World dean"). In the build stage add a build_binary job using the custom Ubuntu image registry.gitlab.com/chusiang/continuous-delivery-workshop/ubuntu:16.04, run `chmod 755 penguin-htdocs/DEBIAN` then `dpkg -b penguin-htdocs`, and publish the resulting penguin-htdocs.deb as an artifact that expires after one week. In the deploy stage add a deploy_to_dev job using the ansible:2.5.3 image, set the environment to staging with URL http://stg.cdws.drx.tw:31080, trigger only on master, develop, or tags of drx-tw/cdws-2.0-team-a, and execute `ls`, `cd ansible-playbooks/`, write the secret `${VAULT_KEY}` to secret.txt, run `ansible-playbook deploy.yml`, then delete secret.txt. In the test stage add a test_dev job using the same ansible image, also on the staging environment with the same triggers, and run `cd ansible-playbooks/`, write `${VAULT_KEY}` to secret.txt, run `ansible-playbook test.yml`, and remove secret.txt. In the release stage add a deploy_to_prod job using the ansible image, set the environment to production with URL http://stg.cdws.drx.tw:31180, trigger only on master or tags of the same project, and run `ls`, `cd ansible-playbooks/`, write `${VAULT_KEY}` to secret.txt, run `ansible-playbook -i production deploy.yml`, and delete secret.txt.
